description: Primary fixed-time solver3 metaheuristic autoresearch metric. Every canonical case in the long-budget mixed feature-surface bundle contributes through the same explicit normalized-score math and equal weight, then the final aggregate is scaled by 100 for readability.
weighting_note: All long-budget solver3 metaheuristic autoresearch cases currently use equal weight 1.0, so the primary metric is 100 times the arithmetic mean of the nine per-case normalized scores.
